content: BP's business model resilience narrative shows mixed credibility signals. Strong disclosure practices with quantified metrics on adjusted free cash flow growth and clear financial commitments (78% consistency rate across 91 tracked commitments) indicate substantive strategic planning, though the talent signal reveals no workforce positioning around business model transformation despite high-confidence data (n=20). This disconnect between financial articulation and human capital alignment warrants monitoring, while regulatory and supply chain evidence remains unmeasured rather than negative.
